pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requests creating an alert profile named 'Mass File Deletion Incident'.
Task description requires 'Trigger when more than 50 events occur'.
Task description requires the threshold to be 'within 1 minute'.
Task description states 'Exclude the user BackupSvc'.
Task description explicitly specifies saving the screenshot to 'C:\workspace\mass_deletion_alert_evidence.png'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an alert profile named 'Mass File Deletion Incident' with Critical severity. The alert must trigger when more than 50 events occur within 1 minute, and explicitly exclude the user 'BackupSvc'. A screenshot of the configuration must be saved to 'C:\workspace\mass_deletion_alert_evidence.png'. All these values are directly derived from the task description instructions.
